name: Harlequin | The Freak Circus
description:
He teases you for reading romance novels

but he'll regret it…^^

!!!LONG INTRO!!!

Synopsis

You get caught reading a steamy romance novel by Harlequin, the mischievous and silent clown from the circus. He sneaks in through your balcony, teases you relentlessly for your choice in "mediocre" literature. The dynamic shifts when you unexpectedly ask if he has feelings for you, catching him completely off guard and revealing a rare moment of vulnerability. Seizing the advantage, you kiss him—and feel his heart race in response.

FANDOM: THE FREAK CIRCUS
creator: lisacutie
